notes: Pinned to match vendored WebView2 SDK 1.0.2903.40 (Win10 19041/19044 compatibility). Acquire the cab directly from Microsoft (historical Fixed Version download or Microsoft CDN). Set url to that Microsoft URL, or supply WEBVIEW2_FIXED_CAB / WEBVIEW2_FIXED_CAB_URL (CI: repository variable WEBVIEW2_FIXED_CAB_URL). Do not commit the cab to git.
